title: Raza
writer: Francisco Franco, José Luis Sáenz de Heredia, Antonio Román
actors: Alfredo Mayo, Ana Mariscal, José Nieto
plot: When the Spanish Republic is declared in 1931, three brothers go separate ways. One, a priest, is killed by leftists. One, a member of the government, betrays his family's traditional ideals. The third fights on the side of Franco...
